hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite arXiv preprints with 2025 dates and IDs (e.g., arXiv:2502.16820, arXiv:2510.19117) that do not exist. These fabricated citations appear in the Related Work section and bibliography.
hallucinations.evidence: References 1-5: Chen et al. (2025) arXiv:2502.16820, Grewal et al. (2024) arXiv:2410.22685, Liu et al. (2025) arXiv:2503.15850, Noël (2025) arXiv:2510.19117, Watson and Cho (2024) arXiv:2404.12535

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinated (nonexistent) citations to future/non-existent arXiv papers. Experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided code and synthetic data generation.
